name: A Plus Credit Services LLC
description_short: A Plus Credit Services is a Miami-based credit repair firm claiming 10,000+ clients and 1,400+ Google reviews. Not BBB accredited. Consumers should verify credentials and compare against established national credit repair providers.
description_long:
A Plus Credit Services LLC is a credit repair firm based in Miami, Florida, that claims to have helped over 10,000 clients improve their credit scores. The company has accumulated over 2,800 Google reviews at strong ratings, building a substantial local presence in the South Florida market. Like many Miami-based credit repair firms, A Plus Credit Services appears to serve a primarily Hispanic consumer base with bilingual (English/Spanish) services.

The company offers standard credit repair services including credit report analysis across all three major bureaus, dispute letter preparation and filing, debt validation requests to creditors and collection agencies, and credit-building strategy guidance. The specific pricing structure is not publicly available on their website, requiring direct contact for quotes. A Plus Credit Services markets primarily through social media and local referrals.

The company is not BBB accredited and has no BBB rating. The BBB profile notes the Miami entity as out of business, which raises questions about corporate structure and operating status. Multiple companies operate under similar "A Plus Credit" names in different states (Tampa, Houston, Austin, Tucson), which can create consumer confusion. Without BBB accreditation, NFCC membership, or other third-party credentialing, consumers have limited independent verification of service quality beyond Google reviews.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Credit Repair Service
features: Three-bureau credit report review and analysis
Dispute filing for inaccurate or outdated items
Cease and desist letters to collectors

pros: Exceptionally high review volume — 2,854 Google reviews averaging 4.8/5 signals consistent service quality at scale
Miami-based with apparent bilingual capabilities, making them accessible to Spanish-speaking clients
Operates as a credit counseling service, suggesting a more holistic approach beyond basic dispute letter filing
Local presence allows for in-person consultations, which many online-only competitors cannot offer
Long-standing presence in a competitive South Florida market indicates operational stability
Reportedly strong client communication based on review sentiment patterns
cons: Like all credit repair firms, cannot legally guarantee score improvements or removal of accurate negative information
Pricing and contract terms are not publicly disclosed on the website, requiring a consultation before cost comparison is possible
No widely published accreditation from NFCC or similar nonprofit counseling bodies found, which some consumers may look for
Services may overlap significantly with what consumers can do themselves for free through the bureaus' online dispute portals
As a for-profit firm, incentives may differ from nonprofit credit counseling agencies that offer debt management plans at lower or subsidized costs
best_for: South Florida residents seeking local credit repair with bilingual services
Consumers with inaccurate items on credit reports who want professional dispute assistance
Individuals who have verified the company credentials and pricing before enrolling
diagnosis: A Plus Credit Services has strong Google review volume (2,800+) suggesting active client acquisition in South Florida. However, the lack of BBB accreditation, no public pricing, and the BBB noting the Miami entity as out of business are concerning signals. Multiple similarly-named companies across states add confusion. Before enrolling, consumers should: verify the company is currently operating and licensed in their state, get pricing and contract terms in writing, confirm CROA compliance (no upfront fees before work begins), and compare against established providers like The Credit People ($79/mo) or Lexington Law.
services: Credit report review and analysis across all three major bureaus
Dispute filing for inaccurate, unverifiable, or outdated negative items
Goodwill letter campaigns targeting creditors for late payment removal
Debt validation requests sent to collection agencies
Credit counseling and personalized score-building guidance
Credit utilization and account mix optimization advice
Identity theft remediation and fraud alert assistance
Ongoing credit monitoring support during the repair process
Education on secured credit products and credit-building strategies
Consultation services for clients preparing for mortgage or auto loan applications
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
